reason: Check sub-agent verifies: (1) SubagentRunRow interface used in banner matches store's actual type (no drift). (2) terminalDurMs formula for cancelled-banner duration matches B1 fix (`finishedAt - startedAt`, not nowTick). (3) banner v-if doesn't conflict with showChatEvents filter.
Check sub-agent verifies banner uses ONLY token-based colors (no inline hex), reuses existing palette per spec.
Check sub-agent verifies: if banner CSS needs :deep() wrapping when DialogContent portals — applies the Vue 3.5 empirical rule (plain scoped may work, :deep() is safe defensive default).
Check sub-agent verifies no parallel implementation (e.g. duplicate truncate function created instead of reusing existing helper; inline ⚠ SVG instead of Icon component).

Check sub-agent runs the 4 new tests + 15 existing tests. New tests: failed_drawer_shows_error_banner_with_summary_text / failed_drawer_falls_back_when_summary_empty / cancelled_drawer_shows_stopped_banner / running_and_completed_states_do_not_render_banner.
